titleStmt.title: SII 16.107: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 107. (A.R. No. 183 of 1913.) GŌRAṆṬLA, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the maṇḍapa in the Mādhavarāyasvāmin temple.
The record is dated Śaka 1455, Vijaya, Kārtika śu. 15, Sunday corresponding to 1533 A.D., November 2.
The inscription is badly damaged and seems to register an order for the revival of the festivals on the days of the daśami as well as the Paurṇami in the temple which had been neglected till then.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1455 Agu nēṭi vijaya saṁvatsarā kārtika śu 15 Ālū
śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī Acyutarāya mahārāyalu pṛthvirājyamu cēyucuṁḍagānu vākiṭi mallapa nā
yanigāri komāruṁḍu timmapanāyanigāru beṭina dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ gōraṁṭla perumāḷaku Ubhayadaśamula mahōtsavālē kāṁka
paU¨rnami puṁṇyakālamaṁdu gōraṁṭla perumāḷasthāniklu nagarivāriki vaṁḍipeṭēdi mānēsi yī Ubhayakālamula mahotsavaṁ būni stānikulu
sēseAṭlagānu kaṭṭaḷla cēstimigāna yī dha¨rmānaku yevvaru tappinānu tama tallitaṁḍrula vāraṇāsilō caṁpina pāpāna bōyinavāru gaṁgakara
ta kavilanuccaṁpina pāpāna bōduru Ani cēsina dha¨rmaśāsanamu maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrī śrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
